name: toMarkdownMCP
description: Convert anything to Markdown — documents, office files, live web pages (Chromium with human-in-the-loop), Obsidian vaults — plus RAG chunking/retrieval and provider-aware token analytics. 62 tools, pure Rust, zero MCP-framework dependencies.
author: Carlo Magno Global

environment.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Optional — enables the ai_* generation tools
environment.CHROME: Optional — path to Chrome/Chromium for the browser_* tools (auto-detected when installed normally)
